_meta.note: Dragon Magics and sample Spells are paraphrased titles only; full mechanics and costs live in Scion: Dragon. Lydia’s example ties Serpent signature to Purification (p. 113).
_meta.source: Scion_Dragon_(Final_Download).pdf, Step Six: Dragon Magic (p. 112) and Dragon Magic chapters

purification.name: Purification
purification.description: Cleansing, sanctifying, or unmaking spiritual taint and corruption in people, places, or bonds.

spells.name: Soothing Aura
spells.summary: Calm hostile or panicked targets in an area; support / restoration tilt.

spells.name: Burn Impurity
spells.summary: Focus cleansing force to scour a specific corruption or curse vector.

luck.name: Luck
luck.description: Bend coincidence and fortune; subtle reroutes of risk and opportunity.

spells.name: Twist Outcome
spells.summary: Spend Inheritance to nudge a roll’s outcome category after the fact (table-dependent).

spells.name: Jinx Trail
spells.summary: Lay bad luck on a target’s next risky action.

understanding.name: Understanding
understanding.description: Read motives, patterns, and hidden truths; consume or channel insight.

spells.name: Read Desire
spells.summary: Surface a subject’s strongest want or fear in the scene.

spells.name: Borrowed Wisdom
spells.summary: Lean on draconic memory to answer one concrete question at a cost.

decay.name: Decay
decay.description: Accelerate rot, ruin, and entropy in matter, institutions, or resolve.

spells.name: Wither Object
spells.summary: Stress structures or gear; environmental hazard tilt.

spells.name: Gnaw Will
spells.summary: Erode a social tie or commitment over time.

flight.name: Flight
flight.description: True draconic mobility—wings, winds, pressure tricks—without relying on mundane transport alone.

spells.name: Aerial Mobility
spells.summary: Sustained personal flight or controlled leaps at scale (per Dragon Magic).

spells.name: Downdraft Slam
spells.summary: Bring aerial force to bear against a zone or target.

flight.source: Scion_Dragon_(Final_Download).pdf, chargen example Lydia (p. 113); Lóng list (p. 70)

elementalManipulationWater.name: Elemental Manipulation (Water)
elementalManipulationWater.description: Shape, summon, or deny water and aqueous phenomena.

spells.name: Flash Flood
spells.summary: Surge water through a controlled corridor or room.

spells.name: Vision of the Distant Shore
spells.summary: Scry through standing water you have a bond to (per example naming).

weatherControl.name: Weather Control
weatherControl.description: Call or banish storms, pressure fronts, and sky-scale omens.

spells.name: Sudden Squall
spells.summary: Localize harsh weather against pursuers or structures.

spells.name: Clear Skies
spells.summary: Break an ongoing weather effect in a region.

illusions.name: Illusions
illusions.description: Weave believable false images, sounds, and tracks.

spells.name: Mask Aura
spells.summary: Hide draconic tells from casual supernatural scrutiny.

spells.name: Phantom Crowd
spells.summary: Populate a scene with illusory extras.

animalControl.name: Animal Control
animalControl.description: Command, borrow senses from, or become one with beasts.

spells.name: Beast Messenger
spells.summary: Dispatch animals with a simple geas.

spells.name: Pack Fury
spells.summary: Rally mundane animals against a chosen threat.

transformation.name: Transformation
transformation.description: Draconic hybrid or war-forms; partial shapeshifting tied to Heir tricks.

spells.name: Scaled Hide
spells.summary: Temporary armored skin or beast-markers.

spells.name: Serpentine Spine
spells.summary: Contortion and reach tricks while mostly human.

elementalManipulationFire.name: Elemental Manipulation (Fire)
elementalManipulationFire.description: Shape flame, heat shimmer, and burning hazards.

spells.name: Heat Shroud
spells.summary: Ward an ally or object from cold / soak fire briefly.

spells.name: Breath Line
spells.summary: Directed gout of fire along a narrow arc.
